title: compliance-atoms v1 atom
description: A single atom in the compliance-atoms catalog. Discriminated by `type`. compliance-atoms holds the primitives for cross-framework compliance mapping — control families, controls, evidence types, and audit requirements spanning SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA, GDPR, and PCI-DSS.

framework.description: Primary compliance framework this atom belongs to. Use cross_frameworks on control-family atoms when the atom spans multiple frameworks.

control_id.description: Vendor- or framework-assigned control identifier (e.g., CC6.1, A.9.2.3, §164.312(a)(1)).

requirement_text.description: The normative requirement text, quoted or paraphrased from the authoritative source.

evidence_types.description: IDs of evidence-type atoms that satisfy this control or audit requirement.
